description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a dynamic walking pose with one leg forward and the other back, suggesting movement. The figure is dressed in casual attire, featuring a fitted jacket and straight-cut jeans, with the fabric showing realistic folds and creases. The shoes are robust and practical, suitable for urban walking, and the overall build of the figure is proportionate and athletic. The hands are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, contributing to the natural walking motion. The head and upper body are not visible in these views, but the lower body and legs are well-modeled with attention to anatomical detail. The surface texture of the clothing appears matte, with subtle shading to indicate material differences between the jacket, jeans, and shoes.
description: A casually dressed adult in a walking pose, wearing a jacket, jeans, and sturdy shoes. The figure is modeled with realistic clothing folds and a natural stride.
description_view_0: Shows the left side of the figure with the left leg forward and clear detail on the jacket and jeans.
description_view_1: Displays the front-left angle, highlighting the stride and the front of the shoes and pants.
description_view_2: Presents the back-left side, showing the rear of the jeans and the heel of the left shoe.
description_view_3: Shows the back of the figure, focusing on the back of the legs and shoes.
